API Reference

Arbiter HTTP API`GET /v1/a2a/agents/:id/agent-card.json``POST /v1/a2a/agents/:id``GET /.well-known/agent-card.json``GET /v1/admin/audit``POST /v1/admin/tenants``GET /v1/admin/tenants/:id``GET /v1/admin/tenants``PATCH /v1/admin/tenants/:id``POST /v1/agents/:id/chat``POST /v1/agents``DELETE /v1/agents/:id``GET /v1/agents/:id``GET /v1/agents``PATCH /v1/agents/:id``POST /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts``DELETE /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid/raw``DELETE /v1/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/artifacts``GET /v1/artifacts/:aid/raw``POST /v1/conversations``DELETE /v1/conversations/:id``GET /v1/conversations/:id``GET /v1/conversations``GET /v1/conversations/:id/messages``POST /v1/conversations/:id/messages``PATCH /v1/conversations/:id``POST /v1/events``GET /v1/health``POST /v1/lessons``DELETE /v1/lessons/:id``GET /v1/lessons/:id``GET /v1/lessons``PATCH /v1/lessons/:id``POST /v1/memory/entries``DELETE /v1/memory/entries/:id``GET /v1/memory/entries/:id``POST /v1/memory/entries/:id/invalidate``GET /v1/memory/entries``PATCH /v1/memory/entries/:id``GET /v1/memory/:agent_id``GET /v1/memory/graph``GET /v1/memory``POST /v1/memory/relations``DELETE /v1/memory/relations/:id``GET /v1/memory/relations``GET /v1/metrics``GET /v1/models``GET /v1/notifications/stream``POST /v1/orchestrate``POST /v1/requests/:id/cancel``GET /v1/requests/:id/events``GET /v1/requests/:id``GET /v1/requests``GET /v1/runs/:id``GET /v1/runs``POST /v1/schedules``DELETE /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules``PATCH /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules/:id/runs``POST /v1/todos``DELETE /v1/todos/:id``GET /v1/todos/:id``GET /v1/todos``PATCH /v1/todos/:id`

Philosophy

Philosophy
API Reference / `GET /.well-known/agent-card.json`

GET /.well-known/agent-card.json

Auth: none — _Status:_ stable

Top-level Agent2Agent (A2A) discovery stub. Returns a minimal AgentCard describing how to authenticate and where to find the per-agent cards. v1.0 of the A2A spec requires skills.length >= 1, so the stub carries a single synthetic discover skill whose description tells callers to fetch /v1/a2a/agents/<agent_id>/agent-card.json with a tenant bearer.

Request

No path params, no query params, no body, no auth header.

curl http://arbiter.example.com/.well-known/agent-card.json

Response

200 OK

Content-Type: application/json. Example body:

{
  "protocolVersion": "1.0",
  "name": "arbiter",
  "description": "Arbiter multi-tenant A2A endpoint. Agents are tenant-scoped; fetch /v1/a2a/agents/<agent_id>/agent-card.json with a tenant bearer token to discover and call individual agents.",
  "url": "https://arbiter.example.com/v1/a2a",
  "version": "stub",
  "preferredTransport": "JSONRPC",
  "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain"],
  "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"],
  "capabilities": {
    "streaming": true,
    "pushNotifications": false,
    "stateTransitionHistory": false
  },
  "skills": [
    {
      "id": "discover",
      "name": "discover",
      "description": "exchange a tenant bearer token for per-agent cards at /v1/a2a/agents/<agent_id>/agent-card.json",
      "tags": ["discovery", "auth-required"]
    }
  ],
  "securitySchemes": {
    "bearer": { "type": "http", "scheme": "bearer" }
  },
  "security": [ { "bearer": [] } ]
}

The url field is built from ApiServerOptions::public_base_url when set; otherwise it's derived from the inbound Host header with scheme http://. Operators terminating TLS in front of arbiter should set public_base_url explicitly so the card advertises the public https:// origin.

Failure modes

StatusWhen
404Wrong path.
5xxProcess crash or upstream proxy misconfig. The handler itself is pure transform — no I/O beyond the Host header read — so 5xx here means the server is broken.

See also

  • A2A protocol concept
  • Per-agent card endpoint
  • JSON-RPC dispatch

Arbiter is experimental open-source infrastructure. Philosophy
